title: feat(insights): add tests (4/4)
body:
<!--
  Thanks for submitting a pull request!
  Please provide enough information so that others can review your pull request.
-->

## Summary

This PR adds test cases for all the related stacked PRs.

- [x] test if `insights` middleware correct sets up userToken.
- [x] test if `insights` middleware send event via insightsClient.
- [x] test if `insights` middleware calls `onEvent` when it's given.
- [x] test if `sendEvent` correctly called when widgets refine.
- [x] test if `sendEvent` exposed to components works fine.
- [x] test if `createSendEvent***` helpers work fine.
- [x] test if `bindEvent` exposed to Hits and InfiniteHits works fine with its listener.

**Stacked PRs**
1. [introduce `insights` middleware](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/pull/4446)
2. [send events from hits and refinementList](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/pull/4456)
3. [implement sendEvent in all the connectors](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/pull/4463)
4. [add tests](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/pull/4464) ← current

## Next Steps

**1. Update the documentation**

**2. When this feature is released and become stable in the future, we need to deprecate**

- `insightsClient` property in instantSearchInstance
- public usage of `getInsightsAnonymousUserToken()` (now the middleware uses it internally)
- the old way of attaching events on hits

```js
           <button ${instantsearch.insights('clickedObjectIDsAfterSearch', {
             eventName: 'click-result',
             objectIDs: [hit.objectID],
           })}>
             Click event
           </button>
           <button ${instantsearch.insights('convertedObjectIDsAfterSearch', {
             eventName: 'click-result',
             objectIDs: [hit.objectID],
           })}>
             Conversion event
           </button>
```

and all the helpers and listeners around that function.
